hero.description: At Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur, advanced fat freezing technology helps reshape your body naturally. No needles. No downtime. Just gradual and visible fat reduction.

benefits.description: Body contouring demand has increased significantly in Kuala Lumpur. People want visible results without surgery or long recovery.
benefits.benefit1Desc: No needles, no incisions, no scars
benefits.benefit3Desc: Up to 25% fat reduction per session

science.description: CoolSculpting is a fat freezing treatment based on cryolipolysis - the scientific principle that fat cells are more sensitive to cold than surrounding tissues.
science.step1: Controlled cooling targets fat cells without damaging skin
science.step2: Fat cells crystallize and break down naturally
science.step3: Body eliminates frozen fat cells through lymphatic system

areas.multipleTitle: Multiple Areas? We've Got You Covered
areas.multipleDesc: CoolSculpting can target multiple areas in one treatment plan

whyNexus.point1Desc: Every plan starts with professional medical consultation
whyNexus.point2Desc: Designed around your body goals and lifestyle
whyNexus.point3Desc: Modern applicators for even cooling and better results
whyNexus.point4Desc: Professional care designed to enhance confidence safely

cost.priceNote: *Customized plans available. Consultation helps determine exact cost.

competitors.adv3Desc: Years of experience in body contouring

faq.a1: Yes. Clinical studies show 20-25% fat reduction in treated areas after one session. Results are permanent as fat cells are eliminated naturally.
faq.a2: Most patients feel intense cold and mild pressure initially, which subsides as the area becomes numb. Many read or relax during treatment.
faq.a3: Results are permanent - treated fat cells are gone forever. Maintaining a stable weight ensures long-lasting outcomes.
faq.a4: Initial changes appear in 4 weeks, with full results visible at 12 weeks as the body naturally eliminates frozen fat cells.

cta.description: Your transformation begins with a consultation. Discover how CoolSculpting can reshape your body safely and effectively.
cta.note: No obligation. Just expert advice tailored to your goals.
